calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

The following two cases were called together: PED-13-296366 Osamu Kawamura vs. Chao-Yu Kawamura and PED-13-296367 Osamu Kawamura vs. Keith Seiji Kawamura.

Appearances: Osamu Kawamura (Petitioner in both cases). Chao-Yu Kawamura (Respondent in PED-13-296366). Keith Seiji Kawamura (Respondent in PED-13-296367).

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented and at
the conclusion of argument, the Court DENIED the requests for the reasons set forth on the record. The Court did find evidence before her is a debt for $2,500.00. Chao-Yu Kawamuara stated that she has a check for $1,500.00 and the Court ordered her to give the check to the Petitioner in court and further ordered the Respondents to pay $500.00 by February 23, 2-13 and $500.00 by March 23, 2013 to Petitioner by mail to his address (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton.
